summary: Phase 7 Guest Search & Discovery — backend + frontend e2e testing complete. 20/20 backend pytest cases pass: 8 demo LIVE properties seeded; all filters (category, city regex, property_type, min/max_price, amenities $all, instant_booking, pet_friendly, bbox), all 4 sorts (recommended/price_asc/price_desc/newest), date-availability (full set when no overlap, blocked-dates exclusion verified by blocking via /calendar/properties/{id}/block-dates and confirming property is filtered out, 400 on invalid date range), and Phase 1-6 regression smoke (login all roles, host dashboard, calendar unified-view) all green. Frontend: guest login → /guest/browse renders 8 cards, advanced filter drawer + amenities toggle + apply/clear, view toggle (grid/split/map), 8 price-pins on map, sort price_asc puts ₹3200 Skyline first, city=Goa returns 1 (Sea Breeze Villa), min_price=999999 → empty-results state, pin click navigates to /property/{id} (which renders the expected 404 page since detail page not yet built — per spec).
action_items: Build the /property/{id} detail page next (P1 booking flow) — currently returns 404 by design.
Optional: add a Mongo compound index on properties (status, city, price_per_night) and on bookings (property_id, check_in_date, check_out_date) to keep /search fast as data grows.
Optional: lat/lng range filter via $geoWithin instead of separate $gte/$lte on each axis would handle antimeridian-crossing bboxes and is more idiomatic for map searches.
critical_code_review_comments: property_routes.search_properties date-availability path uses string comparison for dates ($lt: check_out as string) — works because dates are persisted as ISO yyyy-mm-dd strings everywhere, but a Pydantic date validator on check_in/check_out would prevent malformed input (e.g. '2026-13-99') from silently returning empty results.

GuestBrowse.fetchProperties is keyed only on filters.sort in useEffect; the rest of the filters require an explicit Search/Apply click. This is intentional Airbnb-style behaviour but worth noting — typing in city without clicking Search shows stale results.

Leaflet default marker icon is patched at module top-level via L.Icon.Default.mergeOptions referencing unpkg.com — if the preview environment blocks unpkg, default markers (used as fallback) would fail to render. Custom price-pin uses L.divIcon (no external image), so primary UX is unaffected.

GuestBrowse.js is ~660 lines and the PropertyCard sub-component is colocated. Once detail/booking page is added, consider extracting PropertyCard, FiltersDrawer and ResultsMap to /components for reuse and to keep file under 500 LOC.
test_credentials: guest@propnest.com/guest123 and host@propnest.com/host123 from /app/memory/test_credentials.md verified working.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. The 8 demo LIVE properties from /app/backend/seed_demo_properties.py were already present. A temporary blocked-date range (2026-10-01..2026-10-05) was created on the villa during the availability test and cleaned up via DELETE /api/calendar/blocked-dates/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 search regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_phase7_search.py. Run via `pytest backend/tests/test_phase7_search.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/phase7_results.xml`. Calendar block-dates endpoint is POST /api/calendar/properties/{property_id}/block-dates and the response key for the new id is `blocked_date_id`; deletion is DELETE /api/calendar/blocked-dates/{id}. The /property/{id} detail page is intentionally not built yet (returns 404) — when P1 booking flow is implemented, update GuestBrowse pin/popup tests to assert the detail page renders. Container date is May 6, 2026; use 2026-09+ dates for future availability checks. Map tiles fetch from openstreetmap.org — pins (.price-pin divIcon) render even if tiles are blocked.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA. All 20 backend tests + all critical frontend flows pass. Initial 2 test failures during development were due to test mistakenly using /api/calendar/{id}/block (wrong path) — actual route is /api/calendar/properties/{id}/block-dates. Fixed in test file.
